extraction.one_line_summary: VINE Jay attacked from breakaway to win Pico Jano summit finish while EVENEPOEL Remco took red jersey, dropping ROGLIC Primoz by over a minute in cold/fog conditions
tactical_patterns: EVENEPOEL Remco's tempo on final climb exposed ROGLIC Primoz on long 12.6km ascent where historically Roglic dominates shorter punchy finishes
Cold/fog conditions at 4000ft altitude disproportionately affected ROGLIC and CARAPAZ Richard despite latter's historical wet-weather strength
VINE Jay's breakaway success on category 1 finish contradicts usual peloton control pattern on first genuine GC mountain stage

rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: negative: Lost over a minute to Evenepoel on 12.6km climb, suggesting form issues extend beyond short TT, couldn't even manage rain jacket in cold
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: positive: Dropped entire GC group except Mas on first major summit finish, answering doubts about grand tour climbing ability on long ascents
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: negative: Finished nearly 3 minutes down despite historical wet-weather prowess, alarming collapse from top-10 position
rider_signals.MAS Enric: positive: Only rider to match Evenepoel's acceleration on final climb, finished within 15 seconds and limited losses to 28 seconds GC
rider_signals.VINE Jay: positive: Won from breakaway on category 1 MTF against Padun, proving climbing evolution beyond earlier breakaway specialist reputation
